hooks.command: PLUGIN="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; JAR="$PLUGIN/jdwp-mcp-server/target/mcp-jdwp-java.jar"; MARKER="$PLUGIN/jdwp-mcp-server/target/.build-sha"; EXPECTED=$(git -C "$PLUGIN" rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo no-git); ACTUAL=$(cat "$MARKER" 2>/dev/null || echo); if [ ! -f "$JAR" ] || [ "$EXPECTED" != "$ACTUAL" ]; then "$PLUGIN/mvnw" -f "$PLUGIN/pom.xml" -pl jdwp-mcp-server -am package -DskipTests -q && printf '%s' "$EXPECTED" > "$MARKER"; fi
